text: I find myself drifting through a quiet, modern environment—the first space is open and sparse, making me feel contemplative, almost adrift, as if I have entered a pause between actions. The bean bags invite rest and reflection, but the emptiness amplifies my own presence here. Transitioning into the second room, vibrant colors and bold letters command my attention. The R+D exhibition speaks to progress, collaboration, and the union of human and technology. I feel a sense of curiosity, a spark of inspiration as ideas swirl in the air. The interplay between solitude and innovation stirs a quiet excitement within me, reminding me of the ever-evolving relationship between self and society.
